message:
feat(tui): add keyboard shortcuts for pane resize and split reset

Add Ctrl+Left/Right keyboard hints and Ctrl+0 handler for resetting
pane splits back to defaults. Promote reset_pane_split_state from
#[cfg(test)] to a public method that returns false if already at
defaults, sets a status message on change, and updates the split
state.

Add resize/reset command hints to all three view modes (main, graph,
history) and document the shortcuts in the help overlay including
mouse splitter interaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
